payload.title: bug: /agent/* routes return 404 — missing phpRoutes entry in index.php
payload.body:
## Bug Report

### Description
All `/agent/*` web routes return 404 (Page not found) because `/agent` is not registered in the `$phpRoutes` list in `index.php`.

### Affected endpoints
- `GET /agent/status` — Agent runtime status
- `POST /agent/webhook` — GitHub webhook receiver
- `GET /agent/handoffs` — List handoff events
- `POST /agent/prompt` — Role-based AI prompt execution

### Root cause
`index.php:107` lists all PHP-routed paths. `/agent` is missing. The route matching logic uses `strpos($uri, $route . '/') === 0`, so adding `'/agent'` to the array covers all `/agent/*` subpaths.

### Evidence
```
$ curl -s http://localhost:8080/agent/status
HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found  (returns HTML page, not JSON)
```

### Fix
Add `'/agent'` to the `$phpRoutes` array in `index.php`.

### Routes already correctly registered (verified)
`/api/agent` — works via API router
`/admin/agent` — works via admin prefix match
